form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running disqualified at Cavaillon on March 29 over 2600m. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.comment: Began his campaign last start running disqualified at Cavaillon on March 29 over 2600m. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Second-up here following a spell. Solid effort when 2nd over 2600m at Cavaillon beaten 1.3m by Kitko Tejy in 6-7yo gelding handicap on March 29. Open to plenty of improvement and will be thereabouts again.

formComments.comment: Second-up here following a spell. Solid effort when 2nd over 2600m at Cavaillon beaten 1.3m by Kitko Tejy in 6-7yo gelding handicap on March 29. Open to plenty of improvement and will be thereabouts again.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start unplaced over 2850m at Mauquenchy well beaten by King's Return in 6yo handicap on February 24 at $11. The start before unplaced over 2850m at Mauquenchy, well beaten by Kephora in 6yo handicap on February 12 at $89. Finds a nice race to rediscover his best form.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9.2m finishing fourth behind Koweit De Chenu at Cherbourg over 2625m in a 6yo handicap on March 1 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.9m finishing second behind Kinou Dab at Chartres over 2825m in a 6yo handicap on March 15 at $5.50. Looks the testing material.
